title: Anotis setosa
taxonomy: Anotis setosa is classified as a species of moth in the family Noctuidae. The family Noctuidae is a large and diverse group of moths commonly known as owlet moths or night moths. Anotis setosa is further classified within the subfamily Euteliinae, which is a subfamily of Noctuidae known for their distinctive wing patterns. The classification of Anotis setosa is based on its physical characteristics, such as its wing shape and coloration, as well as its behavior and habits. This classification is used by lepidopterists and entomologists to identify and study the species.
